adminSubscriptions.mktBullets: Displayed feature list (unchecked = not included, struck through)
adminSubscriptions.mktFrRequired: Each line needs French text (other languages fall back to French).
adminSubscriptions.searchHostHint: Search for a host to view/manage its subscription

adminEmails.title: Emails
adminEmails.subject: Subject
adminEmails.remindersHint: Reminders are sent automatically every day (D-30/D-7/D-1 subscriptions, D-2/D-0 trials) — this button stays available to force an immediate send.

adminPayments.title: Payments
adminPayments.companyHint: This information appears on PDF invoices and as the bank-transfer beneficiary.
adminPayments.taxRateHint: Applied to automatically generated invoices. 0 = not subject.
adminPayments.timbreFiscalHint: Added to every automatically generated invoice. 0 = disabled.
adminPayments.credentialsSecurityHint: For security, previously saved credentials are never redisplayed — leave these fields empty if you don't want to change them.
adminPayments.noPaymentHint: Payments appear here as soon as a bank transfer is validated or a Flouci payment is confirmed.

adminFacturation.title: Invoicing
adminFacturation.noInvoiceHint: Invoices are generated automatically when subscriptions come due, or manually from a host's page.

adminWhatsapp.title: WhatsApp relay
adminWhatsapp.subtitle: Automatic delivery of police forms via WhatsApp to a single recipient. Transitional solution pending official approval.
adminWhatsapp.disabledHint: The module is disabled (WHATSAPP_POLICE_ENABLED=false or no recipient configured). No messages are sent.
adminWhatsapp.emptyHint: Each completed check-in queues one record per traveler here, sent automatically to the police station.

adminDashboard.title: Dashboard
adminDashboard.virementValidated: Transfer validated: payment recorded, invoice paid, subscription reactivated.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.passwordRegeneratedNoEmail: Password regenerated, but the email could not be sent (contact support).
settingsPage.leaveEmptyHint: Leave empty to assign only the active property.
settingsPage.tempPasswordEmailHint: An email with a temporary password will be sent automatically.
settingsPage.virementDeclared: Transfer declared — pending validation by the Qayed team.

propertiesPage.noRoomsForProperty: No unit registered for this property.
propertiesPage.bulkInvalidRange: The end number must be greater than or equal to the start number.
propertiesPage.confirmDeleteBody: This action is irreversible. All associated units and data will be deleted.
propertiesPage.selectActiveProperty: Select the property you're currently working on.
propertiesPage.noPropertyAssigned: No property has been assigned to you yet.
propertiesPage.infoNotice: The selected property is your active context for check-ins and the dashboard. Expand a property to manage its units. Switch anytime without logging out.

onboarding.welcomeBodyExisting: Your account is ready. Let's take 2 minutes to configure your property before starting check-ins.
onboarding.welcomeBodyNew: Your account has been created. Let's start by adding your first property, then your units.
onboarding.firstPropertyBody: Enter the basic information. You'll be able to change everything from settings.
onboarding.roomsBody: Add your rooms / units so you can assign check-ins. You'll be able to add more from settings.
onboarding.doneBody: Your property is configured. You can now create your first check-in.

idleWarning.title: Inactive session
idleWarning.subtitle: Automatic logout in
idleWarning.body: You've been inactive for too long. To protect sensitive data, the session is about to close.

profile.title: My profile
profile.pwdSuccess: Password changed. Other sessions have been revoked.

authorityWatchlist.title: Watched persons
authorityWatchlist.identCriteriaHint: At least one identification criterion is required (document number or last name).
authorityWatchlist.dropCsvHint: Drop a CSV file or click
authorityWatchlist.addOrImportHint: Add people manually or import a CSV file.

authorityActivity.nationalScopeHint: You are viewing actions from all authorities (ministry access).
authorityActivity.ownScopeHint: You are viewing only your own actions.

authorityHotels.zoneLimited: Showing only properties in your zone:

authorityAlerts.title: Alerts — Expiring documents
authorityAlerts.noneExpiring: No document expires in the next 30 days.
authorityAlerts.expiringCount_one: {{count}} document expiring in the next 30 days
authorityAlerts.expiringCount_other: {{count}} documents expiring in the next 30 days

authorityDashboard.noArrivals24h: No arrivals in the last 24 hours
authorityDashboard.checkConnection: Check your connection and try again.

authoritySearch.title: Traveler search
authoritySearch.scanMrzHint: Scan the passport or ID card: the traveler is found automatically.
authoritySearch.noGuestFound: No traveler found for these criteria.
authoritySearch.checkSpellingHint: Check the spelling or broaden your search.

paymentResult.confirmedHint: Your subscription has been activated. Thank you for your trust.
paymentResult.errorHint: Could not verify the payment status. Contact support.
paymentResult.failedHint: The payment was not validated. No amount was charged.
paymentResult.cancelledHint: You cancelled the payment. No amount was charged.

hotelSecurity.title: Security alerts
hotelSecurity.procedureHint: For each alert, immediately contact the relevant authorities. Do not disclose any information to the guest. After confirmation, click "Acknowledged".
hotelSecurity.confidentialityNote: These alerts are confidential. The information shown is deliberately limited. Never disclose the room number or reference to the guest concerned.

guestScan.scanFailedRetry: Scan failed. Try again or enter details manually.
guestScan.photoUploadFailed: Document photo not saved — the fiche will be sent without a photo. Please rescan the document.
guestScan.photographHint: Photograph the passport page with the MRZ zone (two code lines) clearly visible.
guestScan.readSuccess: Document read successfully — check the data

auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotSentBody: If an account exists for this address, a reset link has just been sent. The link is valid for 48 hours.
auth.twoFactorCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator app.
auth.footer: Qayed — Platform approved by the Ministry of Interior

setPassword.title: Set your password
setPassword.successBody: Your account is active — you can now sign in.
setPassword.invalidBody: This set-password link is incomplete or has expired. Ask your administrator to resend the invite.

cinScan.scanCinSubtitle: Photograph the card, the form fills in
cinScan.entryPassportSubtitle: Photo of the MRZ zone (2 lines)
cinScan.title: Scan the national ID card
cinScan.cameraHint: Place the card inside the frame
cinScan.timeoutHint: This is taking longer than expected…
cinScan.permissionDenied: Camera access denied. Use "Import an image" or your phone camera.
cinScan.pasteHint: Tip: paste an image with Ctrl+V
cinScan.dropHint: Drop an image here or click to browse
cinScan.privacyNote: Image processed then deleted — الصورة تُعالج ثم تُحذف
cinScan.mrzHint: Frame the page, MRZ zone (2 lines) at the bottom
cinScan.mrzFallbackHint: On-device OCR failed — running advanced analysis
cinScan.notCin: This image is not a Tunisian ID card. Retake the photo.
cinScan.backSide: This photo shows the back — الصورة تظهر الوجه الخلفي
cinScan.scanFailed: Could not read the card. Retry or enter manually.
cinScan.existingClientBody: A record already exists for this ID.
cinScan.lowFieldRequired: Unreadable field: enter the value to continue
cinScan.verifyHint: Check the highlighted fields against the card

checkinWizard.title: New check-in
checkinWizard.extraGuestHint: Late or undeclared arrival — Tap to scan
checkinWizard.adultDocsRequired: Adult documents are required to finalize.
checkinWizard.roomSelectorHint: Enter the stay dates to see room availability
checkinWizard.roomChoiceRequired: Pick a room or continue without an assigned room
checkinWizard.noRoomConfigured: No room configured for this property

register.successHint: You'll be able to add your properties right after signing in.
register.entityTypeHint: Register a company (LLC, corporation…) or an individual. One account manages all your properties.
register.orgHint: You'll be able to add your properties (apartments, villas, hotels…) right after signing in.
register.planHint: Plan applied to all your properties. 7-day free trial included — no payment now.

authority2fa.loadError: Could not load 2FA configuration. Please try again.
authority2fa.enabledHint: Two-step verification is now active on your account.
authority2fa.title: Enhanced security required
authority2fa.subtitle: Access to the authority platform requires two-factor authentication.
authority2fa.step1Hint: Google Authenticator, Authy, Microsoft Authenticator, or equivalent.

planFeatures.title: Real features (enforced by the app)
planFeatures.unlimitedHint: Empty field = unlimited. These limits are actually enforced server-side (web and mobile).
planFeatures.inheritHint: Empty field = plan value. -1 = unlimited. These overrides take precedence over the plan for this customer only.

adminLayout.palettePlaceholder: Navigate or search (host, invoice INV-…, check-in QYD-…)

adminPages.title: Site pages
adminPages.hint: Homepage and public page content, editable in blocks (drag and drop) in FR/EN/AR.
adminPages.pageCreated: Page created — open it to build its content.
adminPages.copyFromFrHint: Copies the French structure into this language for translation.

adminMenus.title: Site menus
adminMenus.hint: Public navbar and footer links — internal pages or external URLs, in 3 languages.
